description: replay the golden vector corpus through canonical-bytes + signing; emit a conformance verdict (P0-T07/T17)
rules: every canonicalization vector must canonicalize + digest without error
every signature vector's DSSE verdict must match its declared expectation
pass requires failed == 0 AND total >= MIN_TOTAL (default 250)
usage: Set CORPUS (canonicalization vectors) + optional SIG_CORPUS (signature vectors) + MIN_TOTAL. Output: conformance.json.
limitation: Validates the local canonical/sign path; the independent Go reproduction is the crosslang perk. The published es6 number corpus (P0-T02) and cosign DSSE interop (P0-T03) are external anchors handled separately.
